name: 4 x SatNet test satellites
location_str: LC-3 (LC-3/LA-1) @ Xichang Satellite Launch Center, CHN
description: Officially described as "Satellite-Internet Technology Demonstration Satellites".  Probably 4 test satellites for the Chinese state-owned LEO communication satellite constellation SatNet.
rocket_fact: To reach low Earth orbit, any rocket must travel at approximately 17,500 mph (28,000 km/h) sideways.
